decision.reasoning: Edge-case exploration: adjusting the cart quantity is a common action that can expose rounding or update issues. Current cart shows 1 unit at $12.50, so changing to 2 should update subtotal and total to $25.00. This will verify reactive updates and consistency between line subtotal and cart total.
